title: Peppery Crispy Turkish Chicken Skewers
description: A quick, peppery Turkish dish featuring crispy chicken wing pieces marinated with smoked paprika, sumac, and fresh herbs, served warm as a flavorful dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 220°C (425°F) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut the chicken wings into bite‑sized pieces and pat dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic‑infused oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, smoked paprika, paprika, sumac, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and salt.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss until they are fully coated; let marinate for at least 15 minutes at room temperature.
Spread the marinated chicken in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 18–20 minutes, turning halfway through, until the skin is crisp and the internal temperature reaches 75°C (165°F).
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle chopped fresh thyme over the top.
Serve immediately, optionally with a side of low‑FODMAP yogurt dip or a simple cucumber salad.
